title: Dalin Oliver brings award-winning comedy to Market Theatre
description: GEORGE NEWS - South African comedian Dalin...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - South African comedian Dalin Oliver is bringing his critically acclaimed one-man stand-up show, 90 Day Comedian, to the Market Community Theatre for one night only on Saturday 6 September (19:00).


> Fresh from performing at the Melbourne International Comedy Festival, Oliver is set to take George audiences on a hilarious 70-minute journey exploring identity, culture and belonging.


With his trademark wit and charm, he reflects on what it means to be proudly South African in a world that often misunderstands our people, heritage and diversity.

As a former high school teacher turned full-time comedian, Oliver has wowed audiences in seven countries and 19 cities worldwide, including shows in Australia, Ireland, the Netherlands, England, France, Spain and Germany.

90 Day Comedian has scooped several accolades, including the Fringe World Best Weekly Comedy Show Award (Perth, 2024), a Bronze Standard Bank Ovation Award (National Arts Festival, 2024), and two Comics Choice Comedy Awards nominations (2024 and 2025).

Tickets cost R150 and are available on www.dalinoliver.com or Quicket. - Compiled by Michelle Pienaar

Dalin Oliver

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
